74770.subject: Re: Svadobná výzdoba
74770.body:
Áno určite.

Prideme za Vami do Košíc alebo vyhovuje u nás v showroome?  :)


Dňa št 18. 6. 2026 o 19:18 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
napísala(a):

> Ano ,
>
> Od 14:00 do 14:45 bolo by to v pohode?
>
> чт, 18 черв. 2026 р. о 19:16 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk> пише:
>
>> O 14.hodine by to holo v poriadku.
>>
>> Mate zaujem o showroom v Rozhanovciach? :)
>>
>> Dňa št 18. 6. 2026 o 19:14 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
>> napísala(a):
>>
>>> Dobry, ale bohuzial nemozeme zajtra doobedu, cca od  14:00? Alebo
>>> pondelok do obedu.
>>> Dakujem za pochopenie
>>>
>>> чт, 18 черв. 2026 р. о 15:51 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk> пише:
>>>
>>>> Zdravím Oleg,
>>>>
>>>> Určite áno, mali by ste čas doobedu?
>>>>
>>>> Ďakujem
>>>>
>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>
>>>> Lenka Gattiker
>>>>
>>>> Dňa št 18. 6. 2026 o 15:33 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
>>>> napísala(a):
>>>>
>>>>> Dobry ,
>>>>>
>>>>> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a ked
>>>>> Ano, ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>>>>>
>>>>> вт, 19 трав. 2026 р. о 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk>
>>>>> пише:
>>>>>
>>>>>> Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a
>>>>>> veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>> stretnutia sa radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.
>>>>>>
>>>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Lenka Gattiker,
>>>>>> Vaša osobná posh asistentka
>>>>>>
>>>>>>

74769.subject: Re: Svadobná výzdoba
74769.body:

>>>> toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím

>>>> prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
>>>> Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
>>>> vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
>>>> Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
>>>> radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

74761.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 18
74761.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-18-oleh-bezuhlyi-n9ajf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BbXWZIsjsR8CSpIOr7cGRsw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2Ww0fy61Wk8Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqjphwcm~l2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqjphwcm-l2
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: The mood is defensive — regulators are tightening the screws from Illinois to Singapore while Washington politics and Gulf capital pull crypto in opposite directions. Adoption headlines now compete head-on with enforcement. 🇨🇳 China Signs 26 Institutions to Cross-Border Digital Yuan Network China has onboarded 26 financial institutions onto a cross-border network for its digital yuan, widening the e-CNY's reach in international settlement. Backers frame it as an accelerant for de-dollarization that could reshape global trade and payment rails. Read full story → 🏛️ Illinois Enacts Crypto Broker Tax, Drawing Industry Backlash Governor JB Pritzker signed a budget package introducing a new transaction tax on digital-asset brokers, prompting sharp criticism from crypto industry groups. Opponents warn the levy could push trading activity and businesses out of the state. More details → ⚖️ Senators File Bipartisan Resolution Opposing an SBF Pardon Senators Ruben Gallego and Cynthia Lummis introduced a bipartisan resolution urging that FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried receive no clemency under any circumstances. The measure puts the chamber on record against pardoning one of crypto's most notorious convicted fraudsters. Read more → 🚨 Singapore's MAS Adds Bybit to Investor Alert List The Monetary Authority of Singapore placed exchange Bybit on its Investor Alert List, publicly flagging it as not licensed to serve the local market. The designation adds regulatory friction for one of the world's larger derivatives venues and could weigh on regional user trust. See details → 🤝 Inveniam to Acquire Mantra Following OM Token Collapse Inveniam announced plans to acquire Mantra, the blockchain project still recovering from last year's dramatic OM token crash and months of market pressure. The deal marks a notable consolidation in the battered real-world-asset sector. Read full story → 🏗️ Gulf Dynasty Heir Moves $6 Trillion Trade Market Onto Blockchain Abdulla Kanoo, heir to a 135-year-old Gulf business dynasty, says his ARP Digital firm is building blockchain settlement infrastructure for trade between emerging economies — a flow that could reach $32 trillion by 2030. It signals a serious institutional bet on tokenized trade finance. More details → 🗳️ Crypto-Backed Barry Moore Wins Alabama GOP Senate Primary Representati
